description: Design a zero-trust internal HR portal on Azure for Contoso's 5,000-employee workforce. The application handles sensitive PII (employee records, compensation, performance reviews) and must comply with internal data classification policy (Level 3 — Confidential). No internet exposure; all access via Entra ID Conditional Access with device compliance checks.
constraints: No public endpoints — all traffic via Private Link and Azure Front Door with private origins
Data at rest must use customer-managed keys (Azure Key Vault HSM-backed)
Conditional Access: require compliant device + MFA for all users; block legacy auth protocols
requiredCapabilities: Entra ID Conditional Access with named locations and device compliance
Azure Confidential Computing or Always Encrypted for compensation data columns
Data loss prevention (DLP) integration for bulk export controls
assumptions: All employees are provisioned in Entra ID via HR-driven provisioning from Workday
Corporate devices are Intune-managed with compliance policies enforced
inlineRequirements: Document break-glass access path for HR admins when Conditional Access blocks during an emergency

documents.name: data-classification.txt
documents.content: Fictional classification: Level 1 (Public), Level 2 (Internal), Level 3 (Confidential — PII, compensation), Level 4 (Restricted — board materials).

topologyHints: App Service Environment (ASE) or Container Apps with VNet injection for full network isolation
Separate read and write databases: read replica for reporting, primary for transactions
securityBaselineHints: CIS Azure Foundations Benchmark Level 2 compliance
Enable Microsoft Defender for Cloud on all resource types
Audit all data access via diagnostic settings to Log Analytics
